Let's Build Something Great Together

Get in touch with our team to discuss your commercial construction project.

Two Locations to Serve You

Whether you're in Washington or Utah, our team is ready to discuss your commercial construction needs.

Headquarters - Pacific, WA

Address:
1433 Valentine Avenue SE #102
Pacific, WA 98047

Phone: (253) 735-8100

Fax: (253) 987-7483

Email: info@northwayinc.com

Serving the Greater Seattle-Tacoma metro area and throughout Washington state.

Mountain Division - Eagle Mountain, UT

Address:
3535 Ranches Parkway, Suite C
Eagle Mountain, UT 84005

Phone: (385) 208-4433

Serving commercial construction clients throughout Utah and the Mountain West region.

Get in Touch

Start Your Project Today

Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you within one business day to discuss your commercial construction needs.

* Required fields. We respect your privacy and will never share your information.

Where We Work

Service Areas

Washington State

Our Pacific headquarters serves commercial construction clients throughout Washington state, with particular expertise in:

  • Greater Seattle-Tacoma Metro Area
  • Auburn, Kent, Federal Way
  • Puyallup, Lacey, Olympia (South Sound)
  • Bellevue, Redmond (Eastside)
  • And throughout Washington state

Utah

Our Mountain Division in Eagle Mountain serves commercial construction clients throughout Utah, including:

  • Eagle Mountain and surrounding areas
  • Salt Lake City Metro Area
  • Provo and Utah County
  • And throughout Utah

Not sure if we serve your area? Contact us to discuss your project location. We're always interested in opportunities to work with great clients on compelling projects.

Connect With Us

Follow Northway Construction on social media to see our latest projects and company updates.

Northway Construction

Trusted commercial general contractor delivering cost-effective, high-quality construction across the Pacific Northwest and Utah for over 20 years.
